meta.purpose: Small-batch reconciliation audit for PL Commentary Bank before any database promotion.
meta.databasePromotionPolicy: Confirmed histories require explicit official/high-trust source support. Ambiguous identity, incomplete context, and same-event current rows stay outside data/database.json. Do not infer achievements from name similarity.
meta.auditReason: Earlier Lot 66-70 research logs on main contain conflicting conclusions. This audit returns to the official HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu CLPL PDF and separates exact official rows from unresolved roster identity/schema promotion work.

primarySourcesChecked: Open PR search on imamuufit/pl-commentary-bank before write
data/database.json roster skeleton on main for Lot 66-68
HPA 2026 Spring Ebetsu Classic Powerlifting official result PDF
Prior merged Lot 66-70 logs #84 and #133 for conflict audit context
batchScope.openPrCheck: One open PR (#111) was present. It is a standalone completion report generator and does not edit athlete data, candidate data, or the A4 print layout, so this isolated audit log is non-overlapping.
batchScope.writeScope: Research audit log only. No app runtime, CSS, print template, A4 layout, data/database.json, or data/research-candidates.json changes.

sourceIndex.title: 第29回北海道クラシックパワーリフティング選手権大会 結果
sourceIndex.rowLevelExtractionStatus: Official PDF text opened and exact rows located for 白川 雄太, 森 大一, and 中薗 謙史. These rows are official-source confirmed as event result rows, but this audit does not mutate database histories.

sourceIndex.title: Merged PR #84 Lot 66-70 research batch
sourceIndex.rowLevelExtractionStatus: Reported exact official-source prior rows for 白川 雄太 and 森 大一 and a near-name candidate for 中園 訓史. Current main roster now spells Lot 68 as 中薗 謙史, so this audit supersedes the near-name wording for Lot 68.

sourceIndex.title: Merged PR #133 Lot 66-70 research batch
sourceIndex.rowLevelExtractionStatus: Reported no promotable prior histories for Lot 66-70. This conflicts with the official PDF rows rechecked in this audit and should not be used to erase the official-source findings.

confirmedFindings.competitionName: 第29回北海道クラシックパワーリフティング選手権大会

athletes.promotionRecommendation: Official-source backed. Promote only in a later schema-safe database pass with source registry URL normalization.

confirmedFindings.competitionName: 第29回北海道クラシックパワーリフティング選手権大会

athletes.promotionRecommendation: Official-source backed. Promote only in a later schema-safe database pass. Note database playerId/englishName romanization is E-67-mo-taichi / Mo Taichi although the Japanese name is 森 大一; this audit does not rename IDs.

confirmedFindings.competitionName: 第29回北海道クラシックパワーリフティング選手権大会

athletes.auditCorrection: PR #84 treated this as a near-name candidate against a roster spelling of 中園 訓史. Current main database roster spells Lot 68 as 中薗 謙史, matching the official PDF row. This audit records it as an official prior-history row, still not promoted to database.json in this run.

notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.reason: This run was intentionally limited to a reconciliation audit because prior merged logs conflict and database source schema/source registry normalization should be handled in a separate database-promotion PR. No uncertain item needed data/research-candidates.json in this audit because all three checked rows are exact-name official HPA rows against current main roster names.
notPromotedToDatabaseThisRun.safeNextStep: Create a separate schema-safe database promotion PR for Lot 66-68 after confirming source registry conventions and avoiding duplicate history IDs.
